CHAR 6
ACO_NUM ACO_NUM ACO Identifier Encrypted ACO Identifier. Format: A##### CHAR 6
NPI_Name NPI_NAME Name of Provider Associated with the NPI Name of provider associated with the NPI as recorded in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership System (PECOS) CHAR 100
TIN_LBN TIN_LBN Legal Business Name Associated with the ACO Participant TIN Legal business name associated with the ACO participant TIN included on the ACO's certified participant list used in financial reconciliation
